verses.1: Lord, you have been our dwelling place for all generations.
verses.3: You turn man to destruction, saying,
verses.4: For a thousand years in your sight are just like yesterday when it is past,
verses.5: You sweep them away as they sleep.
verses.6: In the morning it sprouts and springs up.
verses.7: For we are consumed in your anger.
verses.8: You have set our iniquities before you,
verses.9: For all our days have passed away in your wrath.
verses.10: The days of our years are seventy,
verses.11: Who knows the power of your anger,
verses.12: So teach us to count our days,
verses.14: Satisfy us in the morning with your loving kindness,
verses.15: Make us glad for as many days as you have afflicted us,
verses.16: Let your work appear to your servants,
verses.17: Let the favor of the Lord our God be on us.
